verdict: Held-out-DOMAIN (train math+physics -> test BOOLEAN, a genuinely unseen 3rd domain) = 0.467 mean over 3 seeds. Within-boolean control = 0.611. If held-out-domain <0.80 -> domain-specificity CONFIRMED even with a true 3rd domain; the PRM direction does not transfer across domains, so W1's >=0.80 held-out-DOMAIN gate needs either multi-domain training coverage or the RLVR-reward path (GPU). Rows stay OPEN.
